content.en:
Daoshan Dao Ancestor teased the Forbidden Hall Master on his lips, but in fact, he was also very jealous of the Forbidden Hall Master in his heart, because he knew that the Forbidden Hall Master had a forbidden body and mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, which was a power that even he did not grasp.

Daoshan Dao Ancestor knew that the reason why he was able to become the first Dao Ancestor in the Dao Mountain Realm was because he obtained a relic floating from the Dark Forbidden Domain, and thus rose to become the first Dao Ancestor.

And he did not rely on his own strength to become a Dao Ancestor, but through the Dao Treasure, so he is not a truly perfect Dao Ancestor, but he is much better than other Dao Ancestors.

He preached the entire realm, naturally not with a good heart, but wanted to cultivate some strong people through preaching, and enter the dark forbidden domain for him to collect some treasure resources, but also to dig out the treasures of the realm.

After all, he alone couldn't develop the entire realm at all.

Moreover, even without him preaching, after a long time, the Dao Mountain Realm would slowly develop its own cultivation system.

Therefore, if he preaches in advance, he will have a good reputation and can gather a lot of resources for himself.

As it turned out, he did it right!

He had collected a large amount of resources, and many True Ancestors had entered the Dark Forbidden Realm and found many treasures and gave them to him, thanking him for his preaching.

Moreover, he also obtained countless precious secret treasures and strange objects by trading various secret techniques and promoting the method of Dao Ancestor.

But in the end, he still kept one hand, and the method of promoting Dao Ancestors to everyone was incomplete, and it was difficult to promote to a higher level.

But he still underestimated the hall master of the Forbidden Palace, who was able to promote the Dao Ancestor with the method of incompleteness, and made up for some shortcomings and was promoted to the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

He also wanted to destroy the Forbidden Hall Master, but it was too late.

He was able to suppress the Forbidden Hall Master, but he couldn't kill the Forbidden Hall Master, fortunately, the Forbidden Hall Master had not been able to break through to the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor so far, otherwise he would be in danger.

When the Dao Mountain Dao Lord and the Forbidden Hall Lord confronted each other, the Starhorn Beast Clan also arrived.

However, there were relatively few Dao Ancestors from the Starhorn Clan, only more than fifty Dao Ancestors came, but almost all of them were Dao Ancestors above the Double Heaven, and there were six Dao Ancestors from the Fourth Heaven, and the lineup was also very strong.

The four transcendent forces have arrived, but the Lord of the Dark God Temple is still unwilling to hand over the Boundary Beast, and must wait for the arrival of the Void Heaven One Vein.

Everyone didn't dare to do it, so they could only wait for the arrival of the Void Sky Vein.

Finally, another half a day passed, and the Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven One Pulse arrived.

Bang!!!!

More than two hundred Dao Ancestors came together, which really shocked the audience.

As the weakest transcendent force, the Void Heaven One Pulse has hundreds of Dao Ancestors in a short period of time, which is really the envy of countless people, and many True Ancestors regret why they didn't join the Void Heaven One Pulse, otherwise they would have hoped to be promoted to Dao Ancestor.

However, the Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven One Vein are relatively weak, basically they are all One-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestors, more than a dozen Two-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and they have just been promoted, there is no Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and one Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, that is, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Such a lineup seems luxurious, but in fact it is far inferior to the other four transcendent forces.

However, the other four transcendent forces did not dare to underestimate the Void Heaven lineage.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor didn't feel strange at all when he saw so many Dao Ancestors coming from the Beast Forbidden Land, when he came, he had already expected it, so he would bring so many Dao Ancestors.

But he still underestimated the desire of other forces for the beasts of the world, and even the legendary Daoshan Dao Ancestor and the Forbidden Hall Lord came.

"I've seen all Dao Ancestors!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor greeted politely.

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall hurriedly spoke: "Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the Lord of the Dark God Hall said that as long as you Void Heaven One Pulse is willing to give up chasing and killing the Dark God Temple, they will let the corpse of the Boundless Beast go. Our four transcendent forces mean that you should give up the pursuit of the Dark Temple, what do you think?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor frowned: "Forbidden Hall Master, it's too much for you to ask like this, right? The Dark God Temple Lord intercepted me, our Void Heaven One Pulse has fallen three Dao Ancestors, and we have also killed many Dao Ancestors in the Dark God Temple, the two sides have already made a feud, and it is a life and death feud, if you say a word and let us give up chasing and killing the Dark God Temple, we Void Heaven One Pulse may not be able to do it!"

At this time, Daoshan Dao Ancestor spoke: "Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, how about giving the old man a face, let's forget about this matter, otherwise you, the newly promoted Fifth Transcendent Force, may not be able to stop our four Transcendent Forces!"

Seeing that Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor threatened him, Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not hesitate at all.

"Oh, Daoshan Dao Ancestor, you threaten me? That's right, my strength is indeed far inferior to yours, but in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, we have a supreme Dao Ancestor in the Void Heaven lineage, and you don't have a supreme Dao ancestor. In other words, our Void Heaven Pulse has the ability to destroy your True Kingdom in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm! The Xuanxu Ancient Realm is currently our hope of breaking through to a higher level, where some treasures are being delivered and passed on from moment to time. Your four transcendent forces can destroy my Void Heaven One Bloodline, but the Void Heaven True Kingdom can destroy your foundation. "

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor responded domineeringly.

"Look for death!"

Daoshan Daozu was furious.

A mere newly promoted Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor dared to threaten him?

He was a top-notch Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it didn't take much effort to kill a new Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor like the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Immediately, Daoshan Daozu made a move.

"Stele Mountain!"

A mountain peak supporting a huge monument emerged, suppressing the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

This is not a real mountain, but a manifestation of Taoism.

Of course, this is not a Zhongqian Dao technique, there is no Zhongqian Dao technique at all in the Daoshan realm, this is also a small Qiandao technique, but the Daoshan Dao Ancestor has cultivated it to the Dacheng realm for a long time, which is close to the level of consummation.

There is no way, there is no Dao-level natal talent, and it is simply too difficult and difficult to cultivate a Dao technique to the consummation realm, and there are not many great opportunities in the Daoshan realm, so there is no way for the Daoshan Dao Ancestor to cultivate the Tablet Mountain to the consummation realm.

Moreover, Daoshan Dao Ancestor cultivated many Dao techniques, and under distraction, it was even more difficult to cultivate one Dao technique to the consummation realm.

But the stele mountain in the Dacheng realm is enough to suppress a mere fourfold heavenly dao ancestor.

Except for the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Forbidden Hall Master, the other Four Heavenly Dao Ancestors couldn't block his attack at all, and they all had to be hit hard.

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!"

The Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven One Bloodline competed one after another, wanting to block this blow for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

However, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took the initiative to catch up with this technique.

I saw that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was holding a Dao weapon long sword and made a sword-holding pose.

"Slash!"

A sword slashed out, and the sword light tore through everything and collided with the stele mountain.

Then, something that shocked everyone happened, the sword light of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor actually blocked the Dao Mountain Dao Lord's Tablet Mountain, and left a crack on the Tablet Mountain.

The power of this sword has reached the power of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, although it is only the first time to enter the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it is very good.

"It's impossible, you're just a new Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and you don't have a forbidden body, how can you slash out a sword comparable to a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!!"

The Daoshan Daoist was incredulous.

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall on the side was also stunned, he thought back to that sword light, and felt the sword path contained in that sword light.

Suddenly, the hall master of the Forbidden Hall remembered something, and said, "Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, have you comprehended the supreme sword dao?"

"Of course not, it's just the surface of comprehending the Xeon Sword Dao, if I really comprehend the Xeon Sword Dao, that sword just now should be enough to severely damage the Dao Mountain Dao Master!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

Many Dao Ancestors didn't understand what the supreme sword path in the mouth of the Forbidden Hall Hall Master was, and many Dao Ancestors knew the way of the sword, and they also felt that they had cultivated the way of the sword to the extreme.

But the supreme sword path that the hall master of the forbidden hall said was definitely different from the sword way they understood.

Seeing that many Dao Ancestors were puzzled, the Hall Master of the Forbidden Hall opened his mouth to explain: "The Supreme Sword Dao is a sword path that leads to the path of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and some Dao Ancestors who specialize in the way of the sword, once they comprehend the Supreme Sword Dao, they can forcibly refine a trace of the power of the Dark Forbidden with the Sword Dao when they are the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, so as to master the power of the Dark Forbidden and embark on the path of the Supreme Dao Ancestor." It can be said that mastering the path of the Xeon Sword is equivalent to having a ticket to the Xeon Dao Ancestor, and although it may not necessarily succeed, it is many times greater than the hope of success of other Dao Ancestors. It is rumored that when the Supreme Sword Dao reaches the peak realm, it will definitely be able to become the Supreme Dao Ancestor!"

"That's the case, thank you for sharing this secret, I really don't know!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor thanked him.

He really didn't know that he was able to comprehend the comparability of the Supreme Dao of the Dao, so he naturally observed the sword marks cut by the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and then through the assistance of a treasure of comprehension that he had obtained, he comprehended a trace of fur.

It was also because he comprehended a trace of the supreme sword path that he broke through to the realm of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

When the other Dao Ancestors heard about this secret, they were also very moved, and they also wanted to try to go all the way to the Supreme Sword Dao.

Seeing the expressions of many Dao Ancestors, the Hall Master of the Forbidden Hall sneered.

"Just because you also want to go to the Supreme Sword Path?"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall still hasn't said a word, the foundation is flawed, even if he has the supreme sword dao, there is no way to break through to the supreme dao ancestor.

Of course, if you can break through to the realm of five or six Heavenly Dao Ancestors, there is no problem.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor showed the fur of the Supreme Sword Dao, even if it was weaker than the real Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it would not be too weak.

Daoshan Dao Ancestor knew that it was a little difficult for him to kill the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, once he couldn't kill it, he would really have a vendetta, and his Dao Mountain's True Ancestor in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and countless True Monarchs would probably be killed by the Void Heaven True Country.

He didn't dare to gamble, so he didn't continue to do it!

Once you lose the bet, you can't get anything, and the foundation is destroyed, that's the real regret!

Besides, he himself has no hatred for the Void Heaven, so there is no need to make another move!

If the Daoshan Dao Master doesn't make a move, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor will just assume that the scene just now didn't happen, and there is no need to ask the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor for an explanation.

It really angered Daoshan Dao Ancestor, and it was not easy for the Void Heaven to be in the vein.

"Let's talk about it, what should I do with the Dark Temple? The corpse of the beast must be taken!"

Daoshan Dao Master spoke.
